name: mairu
title: Mairu
description: Interact with Mairu ContextFS directly from Raycast.
author: thomas

commands.name: store-memory
commands.title: Store Memory
commands.description: Store a new memory in Mairu.

commands.name: history-search
commands.title: Search History
commands.description: Semantically search past bash commands and outputs.

commands.name: scrape-web
commands.title: Scrape Web
commands.description: Fetch a URL, extract content, summarize, and store as a context node.

commands.name: vibe-mutation
commands.title: Vibe Mutation
commands.description: Store instructions and memory using natural language.

commands.name: system-status
commands.title: System Status
commands.description: Show Mairu system status and health.

commands.name: analyze-diff
commands.title: Analyze Git Diff
commands.description: Analyze the current git diff against the codebase graph to determine blast radius.

commands.name: analyze-graph
commands.title: Analyze Codebase Graph
commands.description: Analyze the AST graph to generate execution flows and functional clusters (skills).

commands.name: menubar-status
commands.title: Mairu Status
commands.description: Quickly view Mairu system status from the menu bar.

preferences.name: mairuCliPath
preferences.title: Mairu CLI Path
preferences.description: Absolute path to the mairu executable (e.g., /usr/local/bin/mairu). If left blank, it will assume 'mairu' is in your PATH.

preferences.name: defaultProject
preferences.title: Default Project
preferences.description: The default project namespace to use if none is specified.
